mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (user_id, video_id, parent_id, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{videoId}, #{parentId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, video_id, parent_id, content, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM comments WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, user_id, video_id, parent_id, content, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM comments WHERE video_id = #{videoId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at, id LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE video_id = #{videoId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE comments SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
